title: Pacific Biosciences of California, Inc. (PACB) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts - Yahoo Finance
text: According to current analyst ratings, PACB has 4 Buy ratings, 3 Hold ratings, and 1 Sell rating with overall analyst rating of Buy (7.8/10). Price targets show 18 Wall Street analysts with neutral consensus and median price target of $3.00, ranging from $1.50 to $3.00. The company is expected to announce its next earnings report on 08/06/2026, with analysts projecting an EPS of -$0.13. PACB reported its most recent earnings on May 7, 2026 for Q1 2026, posting EPS of -$0.12, exceeding analysts' expectations of -$0.14 by 14.29%. Pacific Biosciences of California Inc faces a negative outlook due to an anticipated decline in gross margins and concerns regarding stagnant utilization rates and weaker than expected demand for new instruments.
